channel.title: GitHub Svelte Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Svelte in GitHub

item.title: ThaUnknown/miru
item.description: Bittorrent streaming software for cats. Stream anime torrents, real-time with no waiting for downloads.

item.title: matt8707/ha-fusion
item.description: A modern, easy-to-use and performant custom Home Assistant dashboard

item.title: JacobLinCool/d1-manager
item.description: D1 Manager is a web UI and API for Cloudflare D1, a serverless SQL database. It provides a web interface for managing databases, tables, and records, as well as an AI assistant to help you write query in natural language.

item.title: snoww/loa-logs
item.description: LOA Logs - Modern DPS Meter for Lost Ark

item.title: CriticalMoments/CMSaasStarter
item.description: A modern SaaS template/boilerplate built with SvelteKit, Tailwind, and Supabase. Includes marketing page, blog, subscriptions, auth, user dashboard, user settings, pricing page, and more.

item.title: BetterDiscord/Installer
item.description: A simple standalone program which automates the installation, removal and maintenance of BetterDiscord.

item.title: skeletonlabs/skeleton
item.description: A complete design system and component solution, built on Tailwind.

item.title: themesberg/flowbite-svelte
item.description: Official Svelte components built for Flowbite and Tailwind CSS

item.title: techniq/svelte-ux
item.description: Collection of Svelte components, actions, stores, and utilities to build highly interactive applications.

item.title: gurucomputing/headscale-ui
item.description: A web frontend for the headscale Tailscale-compatible coordination server

item.title: Project-Sloth/ps-hud
item.description: Ultra customizable hud featuring a unique and robust settings menu. Change eveything about your experience!

item.title: fireship-io/fireship.io
item.description: Build and ship your app faster https://fireship.io

item.title: saadeghi/daisyui
item.description: 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼  The most popular, free and open-source Tailwind CSS component library

item.title: biliup/biliup-app
item.description: b站全平台投稿客户端，支持多p投稿，稿件编辑
